Who We Are

Advisory Grounded in Experience,
Delivered with Precision

YGH Tech is a cybersecurity advisory and consulting firm built around a single conviction: security should serve business, not the other way around. We bring experience, independence, and clarity to organizations navigating complex risk environments.

Our Story

Security Advisory That Respects Your Business

YGH Tech was founded on a straightforward observation: too many organizations receive security advice that is technically sound but operationally irrelevant. Recommendations that do not account for team size, budget realities, regulatory context, or strategic direction create a dangerous illusion of progress.

We built YGH Tech to change that. Our advisory engagements are structured around your specific context, not a generic playbook. Every recommendation we deliver is designed to be actionable, proportionate, and aligned to outcomes your leadership team can articulate and defend.

Work with YGH Tech
Engagements Completed250+
Industries Served40+
Years Combined Experience15+
Client Retention Rate98%
Frameworks Supported10+
Advisory ModelBusiness-First

Mission and Approach

What We Believe About Security Advisory

Our approach is shaped by three core convictions that guide every engagement, from the initial conversation to the final deliverable.

Security is a business problem, not just a technical one.

Every vulnerability and every gap has a business consequence. We communicate security risk in terms leadership understands, revenue, liability, reputation, and operational continuity.

Practical beats perfect.

A 95-page report with 200 findings is not useful. We deliver prioritized, actionable output that your team can execute with the context your leadership needs to support it.

Advisory requires trust, and trust requires honesty.

We tell clients what they need to hear. If your security posture has significant gaps, we will say so and give you a credible path to address them.

Our Standard

“We measure our success not by the size of our reports, but by the clarity of your decisions after working with us.”

YGH Tech Advisory Standard

What Makes YGH Tech Different

Built for Serious Organizations That Need Real Answers

Business-Aligned Advisory

We do not start with a framework and work backward. We start with your business, your risk tolerance, and your strategic priorities and build a security approach from there.

Senior, Experienced Practitioners

Every client engagement is handled by experienced practitioners who have done this work across industries, not entry-level analysts following a checklist.

Tailored, Not Templated

We do not recycle engagements. Every scope, every deliverable, every recommendation is built for your specific environment and organizational context.

Discreet Professional Delivery

Security advisory is inherently sensitive. We operate with the confidentiality and discretion that serious engagements demand, from scoping through final report.

Clear Communication at Every Level

We translate complex technical findings into language your leadership and board can understand and act on without losing the technical rigor your security team needs.

Long-Term Partnership Orientation

Many of our clients have worked with YGH Tech across multiple engagements and years. We invest in understanding your organization because that context makes our advice better.

What We Stand For

The Values That Shape Every Engagement

Integrity

We give honest assessments, even when the findings are uncomfortable. Our clients trust us because we never soften findings to protect a relationship.

Rigor

Every engagement is backed by structured methodology, technical depth, and careful documentation. We take the work seriously because our clients depend on it.

Respect

We respect our clients’ time, intelligence, and operational constraints. We do not waste meetings or pad deliverables.

Confidentiality

Security advisory is sensitive by nature. We treat every engagement and every finding with the discretion our clients have a right to expect.

Leadership

The People Behind YGH Tech

Senior practitioners who have done this work across federal agencies, Fortune 100 enterprises, and mission-critical environments.

Founder
& President

Jerry Hall

SDVOSB U.S. Air Force Veteran Gulf War Veteran 30+ Years

Jerry Hall is the Founder and President of YGH Tech, bringing more than 30 years of leadership and technology experience across the public and private sectors. A disabled U.S. Air Force veteran and Gulf War veteran, Jerry leads YGH Tech as a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business, reflecting both his military service and the company's strong commitment to mission-focused excellence.

He has served in support of national security and defense missions, including work associated with the NSA, and has helped Fortune 100 enterprises and federal organizations including the U.S. Navy, U.S. Air Force, Department of Defense, and Department of Energy improve operations, enhance performance, and achieve strategic objectives.

Jerry is committed to delivering meaningful, measurable outcomes through continual improvement in product development, operational efficiency, and mission execution. He actively mentors companies in the government contracting space and supports Christian youth initiatives and military outreach programs.

Co-Founder

Yvonne G. Hall

WOSB EDWOSB Technology Consultant Systems Strategist

Yvonne G. Hall is the Co-Founder of YGH Technology Consultants and a strategic architect behind the company's vision, systems design, and innovation framework. She brings a powerful combination of technical insight, operational strategy, and human-centered intelligence to the development of scalable, high-performing solutions.

Yvonne's work focuses on aligning technology with real-world function. She specializes in identifying breakdowns in workflow, restructuring systems, and designing infrastructure that improves efficiency, clarity, and long-term performance. Her approach goes beyond surface-level implementation. She builds systems that are designed to hold under pressure and scale with growth.

What distinguishes Yvonne's leadership is her ability to integrate human behavior with technical execution. Her background includes years of experience navigating complex personal and professional environments where decision-making, resilience, and structure were essential. This perspective allows her to develop solutions that are not only technically sound, but practical, sustainable, and aligned with how people actually operate.

In addition to her role at YGH Technology Consultants, Yvonne is the founder of EQGenix Inc., a performance-driven emotional intelligence company, and Life in Darkness (LID), a faith-based initiative focused on suicide prevention and mental wellness. These ventures reflect her broader mission: to build systems, both technological and human, that create strength, clarity, and lasting impact.

Work Together

If you are looking for a security advisory partner that will give you straight answers and practical guidance, we would like to hear about your organization.
